Legal

Terms of Service

The terms below govern your use of this website. They are a plain-language summary; full terms are available on request.

Last updated: 2026

Acceptance

By accessing this website you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

Informational purpose and no advice

The content on this site is provided for general information about Navex Capital and its services. Nothing here constitutes investment, financial, legal, tax, or accounting advice, an offer, or a solicitation to buy or sell any security or to pursue any transaction. Any engagement is governed by a separate written agreement.

Track record

Figures and examples shown reflect the prior operator experience of the founding team before Navex Capital and are described in good faith. Past results do not guarantee future outcomes.

Intellectual property

The text, design, marks, and graphics on this site are the property of Navex Capital unless otherwise noted, and may not be reproduced without permission.

External links

This site may link to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or practices of those sites.

Limitation of liability

The site is provided on an "as is" basis. To the extent permitted by law, Navex Capital is not liable for any loss arising from reliance on its content.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to info@navexcapital.com.

Operator-led maritime, transport & logistics advisory for private equity and business owners.
